title: aloe boylei subsp. boylei
intro: Aloe boylei subsp. boylei, a subspecies of succulent plant, is a type of aloe native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Aloe boylei subsp. boylei include soothing sunburns, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Aloe boylei subsp. boylei can be prepared as a gel or juice for topical application, and it can also be used to make herbal teas or infusions.
